hooks.command: [ "$CORVIA_HOOKS_DISABLED" = "1" ] && exit 0; corvia hooks run --event PostToolUse 2>/tmp/.corvia-hook-err || { rc=$?; grep -q "unrecognized subcommand" /tmp/.corvia-hook-err 2>/dev/null && exit 0; cat /tmp/.corvia-hook-err >&2; exit $rc; }
